title: Lebanon's internal splits over talks with Israel trip up Saudi mediation efforts
summary: By Laila Bassam, Maya Gebeily, Tom Perry and Samia Nakhoul BEIRUT, April 30 (Reuters) - A growing rift among top Lebanese officials has thrown a wrench into Saudi efforts to help Lebanon's leaders
